Clickable Elements Without Role or Keyboard Access Test

These <div> and <span> elements have onclick handlers but no role or tabindex. They are inaccessible to keyboard users and not announced as interactive by screen readers.

Save Document
Discard Changes
Export PDF

Clickable Card

This entire card is clickable via onclick but has no role="button" and no tabindex. Keyboard users cannot activate it.

Another Clickable Card

Same pattern — onclick without role or tabindex.
